description_long: This hotel is a modern, low-rise building set within a spacious, landscaped property. The main structure features clean lines, flat roofs, and a mix of light and dark exterior materials, with large windows and geometric forms. The grounds include a tennis court, a manicured lawn, palm trees, and a garden area with outdoor seating, all enclosed by a perimeter fence. The entrance area is marked by a driveway and a covered drop-off zone, with parking spaces visible nearby. Decorative shrubs and flowering plants line parts of the property, adding color and visual interest. The overall design emphasizes openness, luxury, and contemporary aesthetics, suitable for an upscale urban or suburban environment.
description: A modern, low-rise hotel with flat roofs, large windows, and landscaped grounds featuring a tennis court, gardens, and a driveway. The property is enclosed by a fence and accented with palm trees and decorative plants.
description_view_0: From this view, the hotel’s main entrance, driveway, tennis court, and expansive lawn are clearly visible, with palm trees and a fenced perimeter.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the elongated structure of the hotel, the garden seating area, and the tennis court, with the driveway and parking area partially visible.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the hotel, the large central lawn, and the tennis court, with decorative shrubs lining the property’s edge.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the side of the hotel, the tennis court, and the garden area, with the driveway and parking area more prominent.
attribute_entrance_canopy: metal and glass canopy over the main entrance
